channel.title: pavelzw's blog
channel.description: My personal blog about software development and other stuff.

item.title: Optimize pickling disk space for deploying scikit-learn trees to production
item.description: We present an open source library to shrink pickled scikit-learn and lightgbm models. We will provide insights of how pickling ML models work and how to improve the disk representation. With this approach, we can reduce the deployment size of machine learning applications up to 6x.
item.author: pavelzw@gmail.com (Pavel Zwerschke)
